execution_boundary.summary: Emergency stop directly overlaps execution prevention and interruption.

preparation_boundary.summary: Stop conditions may be triggered before final execution if preparation becomes unsafe.

commitment_boundary.summary: Emergency stop must be mapped to StegVerse fail-closed and standing semantics.

semantic_equivalence_boundary.summary: Equivalent unsafe actions need normalized stop-condition mappings.

unknown_trajectory_boundary.summary: Unknown unsafe conditions should favor stop or escalation rather than silent allow.

authority_boundary.summary: Stop convention is not StegVerse execution authority.

evidence_freshness_boundary.summary: Stop triggers require current state and evidence.

reconstruction_boundary.summary: Stop decisions need preserved trigger evidence for reconstruction.

interoperability_path.summary: Emergency stop outputs can route into fail-closed Commitment Candidate review.

next_required_action: add emergency-stop fixture for execution and unknown-trajectory benchmark cases
